title: create: simple buildings of lost civilization
description: a simple addon of the "create" mod that adds abandoned buildings
body:
Create: Simple Buildings of a Vanished Civilization is a simple addon that adds abandoned buildings to the game using blocks and items from the Create mod.
_________________________________________________________________________________________
![factory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de76d698e4f9dee4cac6e301923c157f522fd56d.png)
_________________________________________________________________________________________
At the present time, there are only:
1. factory
2. railway station in the desert
3. railway station
4. a well with water
5. lighthouse
6. the barn
_________________________________________________________________________________________



FOR THE MOD TO WORK, YOU NEED TO INSTALL CREATE
